_meta.note: User mentioned 141 mismatches but current bt_audit_result.json summary shows 29. Classified all 29.

unit_scale_mismatch.description: computed raw number correct but target includes unit/exponent/prefix (K, M, 10^N, kW, V) that auditor strips incorrectly

partial_expression_extraction.description: auditor extracted only first sub-expression of compound raw (e.g. 'A/B' -> A), losing the operator that would produce target

examples.cause: target is ratio 1e-6/1e-5=0.1, auditor took LHS 1.0

percent_vs_ratio.description: computed is fraction (0..1) while target is percentage (0..100); factor of 100

target_parse_error.description: target_raw contains inequality/range/label that parser misread as wrong literal (q_95, <0.06, 9-15)

examples.cause: parser took '95' from 'q_95' label instead of 2.0
inequality bound, computed value violates ceiling

definition_divergence.description: BT expression evaluates a different invariant than what the table row actually reports (semantic mismatch)

examples.cause: tau+sigma is structural count, target is 'values' alone
sigma divisor-sum vs atomic mass number A
LHS computed, target is the solved n

approximation_rounding.description: computed within ~5-17% of target; genuine floating/rounding drift, effectively PASS-worthy

remediation_hints.unit_scale_mismatch: extend target_raw parser: recognize suffixes K/M/G and 10^N notation
remediation_hints.partial_expression_extraction: when raw contains '/' or '·', evaluate both sides before comparing
remediation_hints.percent_vs_ratio: auto-multiply computed by 100 when raw endswith '%'
remediation_hints.target_parse_error: strip label tokens (q_, Re_, Pr_) before numeric scan; support inequality tolerance
remediation_hints.definition_divergence: require reviewer tag; do not auto-fix
remediation_hints.approximation_rounding: raise MATCH tolerance from 1% to 5% for 'known' rows with ~ prefix
